author: marcel-goldammer
description: Automatically highlight specified keywords within your notes for enhanced visibility and quick reference.

manifest.author: Marcel Goldammer
manifest.description: Automatically highlight specified keywords within your Obsidian notes for enhanced visibility and quick reference.
manifest.name: Keyword Highlighter

name: Keyword Highlighter

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added an option to disable the use of font color and background color individually (#26).
releases.name: Keyword Highlighter 1.3.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: This patch fixes a bug where users could not create new keywords because of an error during the color generation.
releases.name: Keyword Highlighter 1.3.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- The colon `:`to trigger keywords got removed. (#24, thanks to @MarkZaytsev)

If you still want the colon to be highlighted, please add it to your keywords, e.g. `TODO:` instead of `TODO`.
releases.name: Keyword Highlighter 1.3.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- You can now use different font styles (**bold**, _italic_, underline, strikethrough) (#10)
- Create new keywords by using the command "Add a new keyword" (#12)
- Creating a new keyword will now render initial foreground and background color (#18)
- Resolved an issue where callout icons were not displaying. (#19)
releases.name: Keyword Highlighter 1.2.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Keyword highlighting now also applicable in Reader mode 📖 

See: #2
releases.name: Keyword Highlighter 1.1.0

releases.author: marcel-goldammer
releases.description:
The initial release of the Keyword Highlighter plugin:

- Add, edit, remove keywords to highlight in Obsidian
- Highlight the defined keywords
releases.name: Keyword Highlighter 1.0.0
